Information about placement into and selection of introductory chemistry courses can be found at: https://chem.wisc.edu/introductory-chemistry-courses-and-placement/.
Exams may be given during evening hours.

classMaterials.sectionNotes: Instructors have assigned the following eText(s) or eText(s) and digital learning tool(s) (DLT, e.g., homework or lab software package) for this course: CM Achieve for Organic Chemistry with Study Guide and Solutions Manual 7e for University of Wisconsin-Madison CHEM 343. Students DO NOT need to buy a print version or a version directly from the publisher. The total cost for these digital materials will be $49.99+sales tax and will be accessible via the Canvas course site no later than the first day of class. The fee will be billed via the students' tuition bills. For more information on Engage, please check out frequently asked questions here: https://kb.wisc.edu/82830.
